channel.title: Oracle — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Oracle (oracle).

item.title: CVE-2026-46914 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Solaris product of Oracle Systems (component: Filesystem). The supported version that is affected is 11.4. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with logon to the infrastructure where Oracle Solar…

item.title: CVE-2026-46913 · 9.3 CRITICAL
item.description: Vulnerability in the JD Edwards EnterpriseOne Tools product of Oracle JD Edwards (component: Installation Security). Supported versions that are affected are 9.2.0.0-9.2.26.2. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows unauthenticated attacker with logo…
